# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
    apiVersion: "2020-04-01"
    name: "[guid(parameters('servicePrincipalId'), 'Contributor')]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[parameters('servicePrincipalId')]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', parameters('contributorRoleId'))]"
      scope: "[subscription().id]"

  - type: "Microsoft.Azure.ActiveDirectory/b2cDirectories/servicePrincipals"
    apiVersion: "2021-03-01"
    name: "[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]"
    properties:
      appId: "[parameters('appId')]"
      displayName: "[parameters('servicePrincipalName')]"
      passwordCredentials:
        - endDate: "[addDays(utcNow(), 365)]"
          secret: "[parameters('servicePrincipalSecret')]"

parameters:
  servicePrincipalId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The ID of the Service Principal."
  contributorRoleId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382b3333"
    metadata:
      description: "The role ID for Contributor role."
  servicePrincipalName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The name of the Service Principal."
  appId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The Application ID for the Service Principal."
  servicePrincipalSecret:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: "The secret for the Service Principal."
